## Design Changes — Final Status

### MAJOR CHANGES (8/8 ✓ APPLIED)

| # | Change | Status | Evidence in Screenshot |
|---|--------|--------|------------------------|
| 1 | Strengthen Top Summary Hierarchy | ✓ COMPLETE | Title "Import Dashboard" visible; batch metadata (givebutter_donors_june.csv, IMP-2026-006, Jun 8, 2026) positioned directly below; "HUMAN-IN-LOOP · NO AUTO-APPLY" safety badge visible in blue |
| 2 | Make Validation Breakdown Scannable | ✓ COMPLETE | "45 PASS, 5 WARNING, 0 FAIL" with checkmarks (✓) clearly visible; status indicators prominent |
| 3 | Improve Review Queue Cards | ✓ COMPLETE | Three cards displayed: "12 Pending Normalizations", "5 Pending Households", "3 Duplicate Candidates" (note: shows "Duplicate Candidates" ✓) with safe navigation buttons |
| 4 | Clarify Read-Only Dashboard Behavior | ✓ COMPLETE | Read-only note VISIBLE below queue cards: "Dashboard is read-only. Decisions happen in review screens." |
| 5 | Improve Recent Actions Audit Trail | ✓ COMPLETE | "Audit Trail" section visible with entries showing "Review decision:" prefix format (e.g., "Review decision: Approved Normalization") |
| 6 | Improve v1 Guardrails Panel | ✓ COMPLETE | Dark "v1 Guardrails" panel visible on right side showing constraints |
| 7 | Refine Export Access | ✓ COMPLETE | "Export Access" section visible with "Open Export Console →" button (with arrow, indicating navigation) |
| 8 | Visual Polish | ✓ COMPLETE | DonorTrust design language applied; clean layout; consistent spacing; professional appearance |

### FINAL POLISH REFINEMENTS (5/5 ✓ APPLIED)

| # | Change | Status | Evidence in Screenshot |
|---|--------|--------|------------------------|
| 9 | Duplicate Queue CTA Specificity | ✓ COMPLETE | Card displays "3 Duplicate Candidates" with button "Review Duplicate Candidates" (not generic "Review Duplicates") |
| 10 | Export Button Clarity | ✓ COMPLETE | Button reads "Open Export Console →" with arrow (verb "Open" clarifies navigation vs. execution) |
| 11 | Read-Only Note Visibility | ✓ COMPLETE | Note is visible and positioned directly below the three queue cards as specified |
| 12 | Recent Actions Historical Language | ✓ COMPLETE | Audit Trail entries begin with "Review decision:" prefix (visible in screenshot: "Review decision: Approved Normalization", "Review decision: Deferred Duplicate", etc.) |
| 13 | Safety Badge Enhancement | ✓ COMPLETE | "HUMAN-IN-LOOP · NO AUTO-APPLY" badge is prominent, clearly visible in blue text below title |

## SUMMARY: 13/13 CHANGES SUCCESSFULLY APPLIED ✅

**All design specifications have been met in the SDK-generated screenshot.**

### Key Observations

1. **SDK Method Effectiveness:** The Stitch SDK `screen.edit(prompt)` method successfully processed the comprehensive 13-change prompt and generated a new screen with all modifications applied

2. **URL-Based Asset Delivery:** Both `getHtml()` and `getImage()` returned valid download URLs that were successfully downloaded and saved

3. **Design Constraints Maintained:**
   - ✅ Dashboard remains read-only (no execute/save buttons)
   - ✅ Human-in-the-loop language throughout
   - ✅ Audit-safe design (transparent decision history)
   - ✅ Safe navigation language (Review, Open, View)
   - ✅ No data mutations or cross-import operations
   - ✅ DonorTrust v1 visual language consistent

4. **Polish Items Completed:**
   - Button text updated correctly
   - Read-only note now visible
   - Language format updated to "Review decision:" pattern
   - Safety badge enhanced and prominent
